frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean starting position with drain properly positioned on block

frame_analyses.description: Hand visible positioning the drain and block, showing proper setup
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good preparation phase, drain appears to have slit opening visible

frame_analyses.description: Drain positioned on block with visible slit and two black marks for suture placement
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear view of target marks on drain, proper positioning for task

frame_analyses.description: Instruments inserted, needle driver grasping suture near needle end
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper instrument insertion, good needle driver positioning on suture

frame_analyses.description: Instruments positioned around drain, beginning suture placement through marks
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Both instruments working together to position suture through drain

frame_analyses.description: Suture being threaded through drain at first mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good needle control, threading appears accurate to target mark

frame_analyses.description: Continuing suture placement, working through second mark on drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth continuation of suture placement through both marks

frame_analyses.description: Beginning knot tying sequence, creating first throw of surgeon's knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initiating knot tying with proper instrument positioning

frame_analyses.description: Completing surgeon's knot double throw, tightening first knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good double throw technique visible, proper surgeon's knot formation

frame_analyses.description: Creating second throw with hand switching, single throw technique
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear hand switching between throws, proper single throw formation

frame_analyses.description: Final throw being created with opposite hand switching
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent hand switching pattern, completing three-throw sequence

frame_analyses.description: Knot completed, preparing to cut suture ends
Task completed with knot in place and suture ends cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion, drain slit appears well-closed by knot

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw, good technique
Correct single throw with proper hand switching
Final throw with appropriate hand switch, secure knot

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Excellent knot placement with complete closure of drain slit

technique_summary: Excellent performance demonstrating proficient laparoscopic suturing skills with proper surgeon's knot technique, consistent hand switching, and accurate suture placement. Task completed efficiently with minimal penalties.
improvement_suggestions: Consider slightly faster needle loading to optimize time
strengths: Perfect knot sequence with surgeon's knot and proper hand switching
Efficient completion time consistent with previous performance
